ddls:
CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated error */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the device where the error occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was logged */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the error (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user logged in when the error occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location where the error occurred */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the error occurred (e.g., production, testing) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "date_of_manufacture" TEXT /* Date when the device was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Level of severity (e.g., low, medium, high, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated error */,
  "corrective_action" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action taken */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the corrective action was taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who took the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_corrections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Reference to the device experiencing errors */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the error type */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_occurrences" INTEGER /* Total number of occurrences of the error */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_reports_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the error type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the error type */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the error type (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user receiving the notification */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated error */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
